```r
# Add financial percentage from ex 2
swiss_gdp_tidy <- swiss_gdp_tidy |> 
  mutate(percent_financial = `Financial service activities and insurance`/`Total`*100)
swiss_gdp_tidy <- swiss_gdp_tidy |> 
  mutate(percent_agriculture = `Agriculture, forestry and fishing`/Total*100)
```
